questions.text: Provide a brief description of your business or organisation (or indicate if you are responding in a personal capacity), including any commercial, professional or health-related relationships with Calvary, Holmesglen Private Hospital and/or Healthscope.
Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if Calvary and Holmesglen Private Hospital are close competitors and whether there are many alternatives.

Please list any other hospitals, including day surgeries, that compete with Holmesglen Private Hospital. Please explain your response and identify any services or specialities these hospitals and day surgeries compete closely on.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
